sentence: go to en.wikipedia.org, search for Bezier curve, and open the article

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Wikipedia Homepage
workflow.description: Search for a specific topic on Wikipedia.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page
If a search box with placeholder 'Search Wikipedia' is visible
actions: Type 'Bezier curve' into the search box

workflow.name: On Search Results Or Article Page
workflow.description: Confirm the search navigated to the Bezier curve article page.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/B
If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Search
actions: If on a search results list, click the first search result link

workflow.name: Article Loaded
workflow.description: The target article is open, confirming successful load.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bezier_curve
If the main heading 'Bezier curve' is visible

state_names: On Search Results Or Article Page

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/login and log in with username tomsmith and password SuperSecretPassword!

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Enter the provided username and password into the login form.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If a text input with ID 'username' is visible
If a text input with ID 'password' is visible
actions: Type 'tomsmith' into the text input with ID 'username'
Type 'SuperSecretPassword!' into the text input with ID 'password'

workflow.name: Login Successful
workflow.description: Confirm that the login was successful and the secure area is reached.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure
If a div with ID 'flash' and text 'You logged into a secure area!' is visible

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/login and log in with username tomsmith and password SuperSecretPassword!

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_loading/2, click Start, and wait for the hidden text to appear

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page

triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Dynamic Loading Page
workflow.description: Click the 'Start' button to initiate the loading process.

workflow.description: Wait for the hidden text to appear after the loading completes.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_loading/2
If a div with id 'finish' is visible

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes and make sure both checkboxes are checked

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Checkboxes Page
workflow.description: Ensure both checkboxes are checked.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes
actions: Click checkbox with label 'checkbox 1' if it is not checked
Click checkbox with label 'checkbox 2' if it is not checked

workflow.name: Checkboxes Verified
workflow.description: Confirm both checkboxes are now checked.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes
If checkbox with label 'checkbox 1' is checked
If checkbox with label 'checkbox 2' is checked

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes and make sure both checkboxes are checked

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Checkboxes Page
workflow.description: Ensure both checkboxes are checked.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes
actions: If checkbox 1 is not checked, click checkbox 1
If checkbox 2 is not checked, click checkbox 2

workflow.name: Checkboxes Verified
workflow.description: Confirm both checkboxes are now checked.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes
If checkbox 1 is checked
If checkbox 2 is checked
